pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11 to enforce compilation for the new JDK version.
Upgrade Spring Boot from version 1.5.4 to 2.2.4, which requires Java 8+ but is aligned with the Java 11 migration strategy.
Upgrade Keycloak admin client dependency from version 3.2.1 to 9.0.0 to support newer Keycloak server features.
Refactor the project structure from a single module to a multi-module POM packaging, moving the main application into a 'config-cli' module.
Remove the Spring Boot parent POM and switch to using spring-boot-dependencies BOM for version management, allowing for a cleaner POM structure.
Explicitly define versions for Maven plugins (failsafe, resources, shade, etc.) in pluginManagement to ensure build reproducibility without relying on parent POM defaults.
Add standard project metadata including licenses, developers, SCM connections, and distribution management for GitHub Packages.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add Maven versions plugin backup file to gitignore to prevent committing generated backup files.
Add Maven shade plugin reduced POM to gitignore to prevent committing generated build artifacts.
Add generic tmp directory to gitignore to prevent committing temporary files.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from an OpenJDK 8 variant to a Java 11 variant to align with the target JDK version.
Remove the explicit installation of curl via apt-get, likely because the new base image includes it or it is no longer needed.
Dockerfile.human_impl: Removed RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the container working directory from /opt/keycloak-config-cli to /tmp/keycloak-config-cli.
Update the volume mount path to match the new working directory structure.
Update the COPY command to reflect the new artifact name and location in the build output.
Remove the custom entrypoint script and associated helper scripts, simplifying the container startup.
Replace the custom entrypoint with a generic bash shell entrypoint.
Remove the explicit JAVA_OPTS environment variable definition, relying on defaults or external configuration.
Copy additional files from a docker/root directory into the container root, likely replacing the previous script-based setup.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project from 'keycloak-config-cli' to 'keycloak-tools' to reflect its broader scope.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title from '# keycloak-config-cli' to '# keycloak-tools'

README.md.general_idea: Update the project description to clarify it contains tools for automating Keycloak deployment.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'This project contains tools used to automate keycloak's deployment process.'

README.md.general_idea: Document the project structure by listing submodules and their descriptions.
Add a compatibility matrix showing supported Keycloak versions for different tool versions.
README.md.human_impl: Added '## Compatibility matrix' table mapping versions to Keycloak 4.x-9.x

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions on how to build the project using Maven.
README.md.human_impl: Added '## Build this project' section with 'mvn package'

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions on how to run the project via Maven and Docker.
README.md.human_impl: Added '## Run this project' section with Maven and Docker examples

README.md.general_idea: Provide a Docker Compose configuration example for running Keycloak and the config tool.
README.md.human_impl: Added '#### Docker-compose' section with YAML configuration

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions on how to run integration tests.
README.md.human_impl: Added '## Integration tests' section with 'mvn verify'

README.md.general_idea: Remove outdated usage instructions that referred to specific file paths and shell scripts.
README.md.human_impl: Removed '## Before using' and '## Usage' sections with old file references

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Remove the explicit PostgreSQL service definition from docker-compose to simplify the setup or rely on Keycloak's internal H2 database.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Removed the 'postgres' service block including image, environment, and volumes.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the Keycloak container image from version 3.2.1.Final to 9.0.0 to align with the Java 11 migration and new feature requirements.
Remove PostgreSQL connection environment variables from the Keycloak service since the external database service was removed.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Removed POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, and POSTGRES_PORT_5432_TCP_ADDR from keycloak environment.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Remove deprecated 'links' configuration for postgres and sts services as they are no longer defined or needed.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Removed 'links: - postgres - sts' from the keycloak service.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Remove persistent volume mounts for Keycloak data, likely switching to ephemeral storage or internal defaults.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Removed volumes mapping './.docker/keycloak/data' for the keycloak service.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update the volume mount path for the configuration CLI tool to point to the new 'example-config' directory.
Update the Keycloak URL environment variable to remove the '/auth' context path, reflecting changes in Keycloak 9.0 routing.
Add new environment variables to configure the behavior of the Keycloak configuration CLI tool.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added WAIT_TIME_IN_SECONDS, SPRING_PROFILES_INCLUDE, and IMPORT_FORCE environment variables.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Explicitly define the entrypoint command for the configuration CLI service.
docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'command: config-cli' to the sts service.
